title: Preserve full storefront with admin access linked to lanepeevy@gmail.com

requirements.summary: Retain all existing storefront features: product listings, shopping cart, checkout flow with payment proof upload, order success page, gallery page, custom order form, and home/landing page.
acceptanceCriteria: Store page displays all products fetched from the backend
Shopping cart persists items and shows correct totals
Checkout page submits orders with optional payment proof upload
Order success page shows confirmation details
Gallery page renders all gallery items
Custom order form allows file upload and submission

file_operations.description: Review and ensure the store page correctly fetches products using useGetAllProducts hook, displays them in a responsive grid with add-to-cart functionality, and handles loading/error states. Verify the blob-storage component is used for product images via ExternalBlob.getDirectURL() to leverage caching.
Review and ensure the Zustand cart store persists to localStorage, correctly calculates totals and item counts, and exposes add, remove, update quantity, and clear actions.

Review and ensure the checkout page displays cart items, collects customer info (name, email, phone), optionally uploads payment proof via ExternalBlob.fromBytes with progress tracking, submits one store order per cart item using submitStoreOrder backend capability, clears the cart on success, and navigates to the order success page with URL params.
Review and ensure the order success page reads customer name, total, and item count from URL search params (using the urlParams utility) and displays confirmation details along with next steps.

Review and ensure the gallery page fetches all gallery items using useGetAllGalleryItems hook, displays them in a responsive grid with images (using ExternalBlob.getDirectURL()), titles, and descriptions, and handles loading/empty states.

Review and ensure the custom order form requires authentication via Internet Identity, collects name, email, phone, description, and optionally uploads a .stl/.obj model file via ExternalBlob.fromBytes, submits using submitCustomOrder backend capability, and handles success/error states with toast notifications.

Review and ensure the home/landing page displays a hero section with call-to-action buttons linking to the store and custom order pages, followed by a features section highlighting key selling points of the 3D printing service.

Review and ensure the Layout component includes a sticky header with navigation links to Home, Store, Gallery, and Custom Order pages, displays the cart icon with item count (from useCart hook), shows the Admin link conditionally for authenticated admin users, and includes Internet Identity login/logout functionality.

requirements.summary: Grant admin access exclusively to the Internet Identity account associated with lanepeevy@gmail.com. This account must be able to access the admin dashboard to add/edit/delete products, view and update orders, manage gallery items, and review payment confirmations.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard is accessible only when signed in with the Internet Identity linked to lanepeevy@gmail.com
Non-admin users and unauthenticated users are redirected away from the admin dashboard
Admin can add, edit, and delete products from the Products Management tab
Admin can view all orders and update their statuses from the Orders Management tab
Admin can manage gallery items from the Gallery Management tab
Admin can view payment confirmation submissions and proof images from the Payments Management tab

file_operations.description: Review and ensure the admin dashboard verifies admin privileges using the authorization component's isCallerAdmin backend capability after Internet Identity authentication. If not authenticated or not admin, redirect to the home page. Render tabbed sections for Products Management, Orders Management, Gallery Management, and Payments Management. Use the authorization component to enforce admin-only access.

Review and ensure the Products Management component displays all products in a data table with actions to add, edit, and delete products. The form dialog must support image file upload via ExternalBlob.fromBytes with upload progress tracking using the blob-storage component. Use addProduct, updateProduct, and deleteProduct backend capabilities with proper error handling and toast notifications.

Review and ensure the Orders Management component fetches all store orders using useGetAllStoreOrders hook, displays them in a table with status badges, and allows admins to update each order's status via a dropdown select using updateStoreOrderStatus backend capability. Include proper error handling and toast notifications.

Review and ensure the Gallery Management component displays all gallery items in a data table with actions to add, edit, and delete items. The form dialog must support image file upload via ExternalBlob.fromBytes with upload progress tracking using the blob-storage component. Use addGalleryItem, updateGalleryItem, and deleteGalleryItem backend capabilities with proper error handling and toast notifications.

Review and ensure the Payments Management component fetches all payment confirmations using useGetAllPaymentConfirmations hook, displays them sorted by newest first, and provides a dialog to view the uploaded payment proof image (using ExternalBlob.getDirectURL()) for each entry. Include proper error handling.

Review and ensure the Layout header conditionally displays the Admin Dashboard link only for authenticated users who have admin privileges. Use the useIsCallerAdmin hook (from useQueries.ts) to check admin status after Internet Identity login. The admin link should navigate to /admin.

Review and ensure the useIsCallerAdmin hook correctly wraps the isCallerAdmin backend capability, is enabled only when the actor is available and user is authenticated, and provides proper loading/error states. This hook is used by the Layout component to conditionally show the admin link.

Review and ensure the Internet Identity provider and hook correctly expose login, logout functions, and the current identity/status state. Ensure logout properly clears the identity and invalidates the TanStack Query cache to prevent stale admin status checks.

requirements.summary: Display the Creative Prints logo in the site header consistently across all pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Creative Prints logo appears in the sticky header on every page
Logo is properly sized and does not break the header layout on mobile or desktop

file_operations.description: Add the Creative Prints logo (using the workspace file path frontend/public/assets/generated/creative-prints-logo-transparent.dim_200x200.png) to the sticky header, positioned to the left of the navigation links. Ensure the logo is properly sized (e.g., h-10 or h-12) and responsive across mobile and desktop viewports. The logo should link to the home page.
